info.name: Mowakely API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Mowakely legal marketplace platform. Built from source code analysis of all routes, controllers, models, validators, and middleware.

## Authentication
- Most endpoints require a JWT Bearer token in the `Authorization` header.
- Login and Register endpoints auto-save the token to `{{token}}` via test scripts.
- The `superadmin` role bypasses all role checks.

## Roles
- `client` - Can create cases, manage own cases, review lawyers, send/receive messages
- `lawyer` - Can browse cases, make offers, manage profile, receive payouts
- `admin` - Full admin dashboard, manage users/lawyers/cases/categories
- `superadmin` - Full system access, manage admins, change roles, ban/unban

## Environment Variables
Set `baseUrl` to your server (default: `http://localhost:3000/api`).

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints. Register, login, refresh tokens, verify email, password management.

request.description: Register a new user account. For lawyer registration, include `specialization` and `years_of_experience`. Rate-limited to 20 requests per 15 minutes.
Authenticate with email and password. Returns access token (JWT, 15min expiry) and refresh token. Auto-saves token to `{{token}}`.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.
Logout the current user by revoking the refresh token. Requires authentication.
Get the currently authenticated user's profile. Response: `{ success: true, data: { user } }`.
Verify user email using the token sent via email.
Send a password reset email to the specified address.
Reset password using the token from the reset email. Body: `{ password: string }` (min 6 chars).

item.name: Categories
item.description: Public category listing. Admin routes for managing categories are under the Admin/Categories folder.

request.description: List all practice area categories. Public endpoint.
Get a single category by ID. Public endpoint.
Create a new category. `name` is auto-uppercased. Requires admin or superadmin role.
Update a category by ID. Requires admin or superadmin role.
Delete a category by ID. Requires admin or superadmin role.

item.name: Cases
item.description: Case management. Clients create cases, lawyers browse and make offers.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Family inheritance dispute case",
  "description": "I need legal assistance with dividing family inheritance property among siblings. The estate includes multiple properties and requires expert legal guidance.",
  "category": "{{categoryId}}",
  "city": "Cairo",
  "budget": 5000
}

request.description: Create a new legal case. Requires client role. `title` min 5, `description` min 20 chars, `budget` min 2000.
List all cases with optional pagination and filtering. Public endpoint.
Get cases for the authenticated client. Requires client role. Returns 404 if no client profile found.
Get cases assigned to the authenticated lawyer. Requires lawyer role.
Get a single case by ID. Public endpoint.
Update a case by ID. `status` enum: open, in_progress, completed, cancelled.
Update only the status of a case. Requires authentication.
Delete a case by ID. Requires client or admin role.

item.name: Offers
item.description: Offer management. Lawyers create offers on cases, clients accept/reject.

request.description: Create a new offer on a case. Requires lawyer role. One offer per lawyer per case (unique constraint).
Get offers made by the authenticated lawyer. Requires lawyer role.
Get all offers for a specific case. Public endpoint.
Get all offers in the system. Requires admin role.
Accept an offer. Only the client who owns the case can accept. Requires client role.
Reject an offer. Only the client who owns the case can reject. Requires client role.
Delete an offer by ID. Requires lawyer (own) or admin role.

item.name: Messages
item.description: Case-related messaging between clients and lawyers. All endpoints require authentication (client, lawyer, or admin).

request.description: Get all messages for a case. Pass `caseId` as query param. Requires auth.
Send a message in a case conversation. Body: `{ caseId, message }`. Message max 5000 chars.
Get unread message count for a case. Response: `{ success: true, data: { unreadCount } }`.
Create a review for a lawyer. Requires client role. `rating` 1-5, `comment` max 1000 chars.
Get all reviews for a specific lawyer. Public endpoint.
Get all reviews in the system. Requires admin role.
Delete a review by ID. Requires admin role.
Create an invoice from a case. Requires admin role.
Get all invoices with pagination. Requires admin role.
Get invoices for the authenticated client. Requires client role.
Get invoices for the authenticated lawyer. Requires lawyer role.
Get a single invoice by ID. Requires authentication.

item.name: Lawyers
item.description: Lawyer profile management and public listing.

request.description: List all lawyers with pagination. Public endpoint.
Get a single lawyer profile by ID. Public endpoint.
Get the authenticated lawyer's profile. Requires lawyer role.
Update the authenticated lawyer's profile. Requires lawyer role.
Create a lawyer profile for an existing user. Requires admin role. Body: `{ userId }`.
Update any lawyer profile by ID. Requires admin or lawyer role.
Delete a lawyer profile by ID. Requires admin role.
Get the authenticated client's profile. Requires client role.
Update the authenticated client's profile. Requires client role.
Get all clients with pagination. Requires admin role.
Create a client profile for an existing user. Body: `{ userId }`. Requires admin role.
Get a single client by ID. Requires admin role.
Update a client by ID. Requires admin role.
Delete a client by ID. Requires admin role.

item.name: Users
item.description: User management (separate from admin/superadmin user management).

request.description: Get all users. Requires admin role.
Get a single user by ID. Requires authentication.
Update a user by ID. Requires authentication. No validation schema defined.
Delete a user by ID. Requires admin role.
Create a payment session for an invoice. Requires client role. `invoiceId` must be a valid MongoDB ObjectId (24 hex chars).
Verify a payment transaction by ID. Public endpoint.
Get payment details by invoice ID. Requires authentication.
Webhook endpoint for Paymob payment callbacks. Public endpoint (no auth).

item.name: Payouts
item.description: Lawyer payout requests and admin management.

request.description: Request a payout. Requires lawyer role. `method` enum: paypal, bank_transfer, stripe.
Get payouts for the authenticated lawyer. Requires lawyer role.
Get all payouts with pagination. Requires admin role.
Update payout status. Requires admin role. `status` enum: pending, processing, completed, failed.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: User notification management. All endpoints require authentication (client, lawyer, or admin).

request.description: Get notifications for the authenticated user.
Create a notification for a user. Requires admin role. `type` enum: offer_received, offer_accepted, new_message, review_added, admin_message.
Mark a single notification as read by ID.
Mark all unread notifications as read for the authenticated user.
Delete a notification by ID.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin dashboard and CRUD operations for users, lawyers, cases, categories. All endpoints require admin or superadmin role.

request.description: Get admin dashboard statistics (counts and summaries).
Get all users with pagination and optional role/status/search filters.
Get a single user by ID.
Create a new user (admin-provisioned, skips registration flow).
Update a user by ID. Cannot modify superadmin users.
Delete a user by ID. Cannot delete superadmin users.
Toggle a user's active status. Body: `{ isActive: boolean }`.
Ban or unban a user. Body: `{ banned: boolean }`.
Get all lawyers with pagination and optional filters.
Get a single lawyer profile by ID.
Create a new lawyer profile.
Update a lawyer profile by ID.
Delete a lawyer profile by ID.
Verify or un-verify a lawyer. Body: `{ verified: boolean }`.
Get all cases with pagination and optional filters.
Get a single case by ID.

body.raw:
{
  "clientUserId": "{{userId}}",
  "title": "Admin-created case",
  "description": "This case was created by an admin on behalf of a client.",
  "category": "{{categoryId}}",
  "budget": 3000,
  "city": "Cairo"
}

request.description: Create a case on behalf of a client. Note: `clientUserId` is the User ID (not Client profile ID).
Update a case by ID.
Delete a case by ID.
Get all categories with pagination.
Get a single category by ID.
Create a new category.
Update a category by ID.
Delete a category by ID.
Manually mark an invoice as paid (admin override).
Create a new admin user. NOTE: This route requires superadmin role despite being mounted under admin.

item.name: Superadmin
item.description: Superadmin-only endpoints for full system management. All endpoints require superadmin role.

request.description: Get superadmin dashboard statistics.
Get detailed system statistics.
Get platform analytics data.
Get all users with pagination and optional filters.
Get a single user by ID.
Create a new user (superadmin-provisioned). Role can be client, lawyer, admin, or superadmin.
Update a user by ID. Can change role to any value including superadmin.
Delete a user by ID.
Ban a user. Body: `{ banned: boolean }`.
Unban a user. No body required.
Get all admin users with pagination.
Create a new admin user.
Delete an admin user by ID.
Change a user's role. `newRole` enum: client, lawyer, admin. Cannot change own role.
Get all client profiles with pagination.
Get a single client profile by ID.
Create a new client (creates both User and Client profile).
Update a client profile by ID.
Delete a client profile by ID.
Get all lawyer profiles with pagination.
Get a single lawyer profile by ID.
Create a new lawyer (creates both User and Lawyer profile).
Update a lawyer profile by ID.
Delete a lawyer profile by ID.
Verify a lawyer.
Remove verification from a lawyer. No body required.
Get all cases with pagination.
Get a single case by ID.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Superadmin case",
  "description": "Case description with all required details for processing.",
  "category": "{{categoryId}}",
  "budget": 5000,
  "city": "Cairo",
  "priority": "high",
  "status": "open"
}

request.description: Create a new case. Supports `priority` (low, medium, high, urgent) and extended `status` values.
Update a case by ID.
Delete a case by ID.
Update only the status of a case.
Get all offers with pagination.
Get a single offer by ID.
Create a new offer.
Update an offer by ID. `status` enum: pending, accepted, rejected, expired, withdrawn.
Delete an offer by ID.
Get all categories with pagination.
Get a single category by ID.
Create a new category. Note: superadmin uses `isActive` (camelCase) while admin uses `is_active` (snake_case).
Update a category by ID.
Delete a category by ID.
Get all reviews with pagination.
Get a single review by ID.
Hide a review (soft-hide).
Publish/unhide a review.
Delete a review by ID.
Root health check.
Basic health check endpoint.
Readiness probe.
Liveness probe.
Detailed health information including uptime, memory, and database status.
